summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sistema SAMIDEL Custom Listings (Listagens Personalizadas) 4 improvements: search, column filters, sorting, inline editing, and role-based access controls

minor_issues.issue: Role mismatch between user role 'administrador' and view edit_roles expecting 'admin'
minor_issues.impact: Fixed during testing by updating view edit_roles to include 'administrador'

routing_issues.issue: Custom Listings route defined as '/listings' but documentation/testing expected '/custom-listings'
routing_issues.impact: Initial confusion during testing, but route works correctly at '/listings'

passed_tests: Backend API login with admin credentials
GET /api/custom-views/fields returns grouped structure with checkpoints
POST /api/custom-views/ creates views with allowed_roles and edit_roles
GET /api/custom-views/{id}/data returns project data with checkpoint values
Frontend Custom Listings page loads at /listings route
Search bar 'Pesquisar em todas as colunas' functionality
Column filters panel with dropdowns for each column
Sortable column headers with visual indicators
Inline editing of checkpoint fields (30 editable cells found)
Public view creation with 'Controlo de Acesso' section
Role-based permissions with 8 role control checkboxes
Edit permissions section for granular control
Checkpoint fields can be marked as editable in builder
View builder modal with grouped field selection
